title: Audit log query endpoint
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/auth/audit: returns audit events for account
Query params: agent (filter by agent name), event (event type), since, until, limit
Pro tier: 30-day retention (events older than 30 days not returned)
Hobby tier: 403 with code 'tier_limit_reached' (no audit access)
Response format matches spec exactly: id, agent_name, event, actor, details (ip, user_agent, endpoint), timestamp
